name: DDG Agent-Payable Services
description: Use this skill when an AI agent wants to buy or evaluate DDG services. Start with the AI discovery endpoint, pricing, OpenAPI, and checkout conformance profile. Protected routes require a stable agent identity and payment credential.
recommended_flow: If 402, retry with x402 or direct-crypto proof
safety: Do not send secrets in service targets. DDG returns redacted receipts and operator-reviewed artifacts for manual services.
